title: Telling Timeless Tales Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
rounds.explanation: hasty: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Very bad or unpleasant.
rounds.explanation: dreadful: Very bad or unpleasant.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Deserving respect and admiration because of good qualities or actions.
rounds.explanation: honorable: Deserving respect and admiration because of good qualities or actions.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Not wanting to do something or feeling unsure about it.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Someone or something you can trust to do what they say they will do.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: He made a hasty decision to leave the game early.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: I felt anxious before my big test at school.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The weather today is very pleasant for a picnic.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Telling Timeless Tales: source text 2': Her cousin Adam, who was _____ but brave, joined her.
rounds.explanation: The text says: Her cousin Adam, who was anxious but brave, joined her.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Hasty Route, part 1': “I’m _____ we packed shade cloths,” said Sami, the team’s youngest.
rounds.explanation: The text says: “I’m grateful we packed shade cloths,” said Sami, the team’s youngest.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Telling Timeless Tales: source text 1': Identify and use opposites (antonyms) such as dreadful/delightful and _____/prosperous.
rounds.explanation: The text says: Identify and use opposites (antonyms) such as dreadful/delightful and miserable/prosperous.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Why was Samira well known in her village?
choices: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
Not wanting to do something or feeling unsure about it.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

rounds.prompt: Why did Adam want to run towards the shimmering water? Why did Samira stop him?
choices: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
Not wanting to do something or feeling unsure about it.
Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

rounds.prompt: Think of a natural phenomenon you have experienced (wind, rain, thunder, drought). How might an ancient community have explained it through a story?
choices: Not wanting to do something or feeling unsure about it.
Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
rounds.answer: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Accept an accurate complete-sentence response supported by a relevant detail from the selected text.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Retell a Legend
rounds.target: He made a hasty decision to leave the game early.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Dramatic Reading
rounds.target: Pick a scene from "The Hasty Route" (your Story file) that has dialogue between two or more characters.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The sunset was so glorious that everyone stopped to take pictures.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The honorable knight always helped those in need.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: She has the most imaginable ideas for her art project.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'glorious' mean in this unit?
choices: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
rounds.explanation: glorious: Very beautiful and wonderful.

rounds.prompt: What does 'contagious' mean in this unit?
choices: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
A disease or feeling that can spread from one person to another.
rounds.answer: A disease or feeling that can spread from one person to another.
rounds.explanation: contagious: A disease or feeling that can spread from one person to another.

rounds.prompt: What does 'furious' mean in this unit?
choices: Feeling happy and thankful for something nice someone has done.
Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
rounds.explanation: furious: Very angry or mad.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'forceful'?
rounds.explanation: forceful is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'profitable'?
rounds.explanation: profitable is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'miserable'?
rounds.explanation: miserable is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: Feeling happy and thankful for something nice someone has done.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Very special or unusual; something that stands out.
Staying loyal and true to someone or something.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: A disease or feeling that can spread from one person to another.
Something that is fair or reasonable to do.
Something that is too bad or painful to accept.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'anxious' mean?
choices: Worried or nervous about something that might happen.
rounds.answer: Worried or nervous about something that might happen.
rounds.explanation: I felt anxious before my big test at school.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Telling Timeless Tales: source text 1': The spring, the story said, would reveal itself only to someone who was patient and reliable, someone who...
rounds.explanation: The text says: The spring, the story said, would reveal itself only to someone who was patient and reliable, someone who could follow the sound without making a hasty choice.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'Telling Timeless Tales: source text 2': Listen." Adam was _____ to pass up the blue shimmer, but he trusted Samira.
rounds.explanation: The text says: Listen." Adam was reluctant to pass up the blue shimmer, but he trusted Samira.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'hasty' mean?
choices: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
Feeling happy and thankful for something nice someone has done.
Worried or nervous about something that might happen.
rounds.answer: Doing something too quickly without thinking carefully.
rounds.explanation: He made a hasty decision to leave the game early.

rounds.prompt: What does 'reluctant' mean?
choices: Feeling happy and thankful for something nice someone has done.
Not wanting to do something or feeling unsure about it.
Worried or nervous about something that might happen.
rounds.answer: Not wanting to do something or feeling unsure about it.
rounds.explanation: She was reluctant to try the new food because she didn't know if she would like it.

rounds.prompt: What does 'furious' mean?
choices: Feeling happy and thankful for something nice someone has done.
rounds.explanation: She was furious when her brother broke her favourite toy.
